mapper.select: select * from public.nafp_t1279_tab
select * from public.nafp_kt1279_tab
select * from public.nafp_ecmf_tab
select * from public.nafp_grapes_tab
select * from public.nafp_cldas_tab
select * from public.nafp_cmpa_tab
select * from public.nafp_swc3km_tab
select * from public.nafp_swc9km_tab
select * from public.nafp_scmoc_tab
select count(datatime) from ${params.tableName} where datatime = #{params.dataTime} and datasource = #{params.dataSource}
mapper.delete:
delete from ${params.tableName} where datasource = #{params.dataSource} and datatime in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(filename) as total from ${params.tableName} where datatime = #{params.dataTime}
select datatime,count(datatime) as arrived from ${params.tableName} where datatime >= #{params.startTime} and datatime < #{params.endTime} group by datatime

select datatype as dataSource,datatime,count(datatime) as arrived from public.nafp_grib_tab where datatime >= #{params.startTime} and datatime < #{params.endTime} group by datatype, datatime order by datatime desc, datatype asc

select datatype as dataSource,datatime,count(datatime) as arrived from public.nafp_grib_tab where datatime >= #{params.startTime} and datatime < #{params.endTime} group by datatype, datatime order by datatime desc, datatype asc
mapper.insert: insert into data_qc_manager_tab (datatime, total, arrived, unarrived, status, inserttime, datasource) values (#{params.dataTime}, #{params.total}, #{params.arrived}, #{params.unarrived}, #{params.status}, #{params.insertTime}, #{params.dataSource})
